parts.display_name: Astro Frontend (full SSR on Cloudflare Workers)

parts.framework: TS Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object SQLite (SlidingWindowRateLimiter)

completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo v2.0.0 with 6 parts (3 workspaces + 3 standalone)
Parallel deep scan: astro-app surface, studio schemas, standalone Workers, infra/CI, existing docs (5 Explore agents)
source-tree-analysis.md written reflecting Astro 6 / Workers topology
project-overview.md + architecture.md written; D1 table count corrected to 13 (legacy + Better Auth + feature)
5 supporting docs (component-inventory, data-models, api-contracts, integration-architecture, development-guide) written directly
Master index.md generated with cross-links to generated docs + strategy docs (with Pages-era staleness warnings) + wiki + BMad
Validation: 0 (To be generated) markers in 9 generated docs; index.md flags 4 strategy docs as Pages-era stale

findings_summary.project_classification: Monorepo v2.0.0 (major bump from v1.18.0 due to Astro 6 + Workers cutover). 6 parts. astro-app + studio + platform-api are npm workspaces; rate-limiter-worker, event-reminders-worker, discord-bot are standalone.
findings_summary.technology_stack: Astro 6.1.10 + @astrojs/cloudflare v13 (Workers-only) + Sanity 5.23 + Tailwind 4.1 (CSS-first) + React 19.2 (islands) + Better Auth 1.5 + Drizzle 0.45 (D1) + nanostores + @schedule-x + Resend + Astro Fonts API (graduated) + astro:env + astro-llms-md + Storybook 10.2 + Vitest 3.2 + Playwright 1.58 + LHCI 0.15 + Pa11y CI
platform_changes_since_2026_04_15: Astro.locals.runtime.env removed; replaced with `import { env } from cloudflare:workers`
Per-env build via CLOUDFLARE_ENV=<name> astro build (legacy `wrangler deploy --env` flag dropped)
Astro Fonts API graduated out of experimental
disable_nodejs_process_v2 workaround flag added (Astro #15434/#14511; remove when compatibility_date >= 2026-02-19)
3 capstone-preview Workers added for Studio Presentation iframe (Story 15.10)
Sponsor agreement gate redesigned with version pinning + audit columns on user (Story 15.11; migrations 0007/0008/0009)
Sitemap-driven LHCI/Pa11y URL set (PR #680) replacing /demo/** scope
astro-llms-md added (gated OFF when stega is enabled)
Vite project-local optimize-cjs-for-workerd plugin pre-bundles picomatch for workerd SSR
key_risks: platform-api has placeholder KV/D1 IDs in wrangler.jsonc and is not wired to astro-app
discord-bot/ Python scaffold diverges from production bots (Workers 'capstone-bot' + 'capstone-ask-worker')
Single D1 (ywcc-capstone-portal) shared between astro-app and event-reminders-worker; migrations must stay coordinated
Cross-script DO dependency: capstone middleware fails closed if rate-limiter-worker is unhealthy
src/pages/portal/api/db-health.ts exposes SQLite table names to authenticated users (TODO: admin gate)
compatibility_date pinned to 2025-12-01; bumping requires re-validating workaround flag set
GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET must be re-put with prod secret at cutover (staging-phase secret invalid)
No Husky/pre-commit hooks; CI is the only enforcement gate
ESLint listed in astro-app deps but no flat-config file -- lint is advisory only

4 strategy docs (cloudflare-guide, cloudflare-infrastructure-guide, cost-optimization-strategy, rate-limiting-with-durable-objects) contain Pages-era references -- flagged in index.md but not rewritten

out_of_tree_workers.notes: Production Discord bot; service-binds to capstone-ask-worker

resume_instructions: Workflow completed successfully. All 9 auto-generated docs + index.md regenerated for v2.0.0. Strategy docs were not rewritten -- index.md flags Pages-era staleness inline.
